## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX to discuss conversion analysis, security messaging, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Security is becoming a key differentiator for Flosum; content strategy should incorporate Salesforce security and DevOps security topics](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Jakub presented conversion analysis focused on UX and on-page recommendations for the blog](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Website improvements needed, including sidebar optimization, chat functionality updates, and better CTAs throughout blog content](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Need to align blog content categorization with Flosum's internal product/solution categories for better lead scoring and personalization](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

## Topics

### Security Messaging

  - [Matt emphasized the importance of leaning into security messaging](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Flosum's DevOps tool is a key differentiator due to its security features (stays within Salesforce, doesn't require external transfers)](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Team to develop specific language around security, particularly for the backup and archive tool](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Conversion Analysis and Website Improvements

  - [Sidebar issues:](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [Long table of contents pushes other elements below the fold](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Recommendation to trim spacing and update sticky nav functionality](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Consider moving author and share buttons to blog header](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Chat popup:](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [Current implementation needs improvement (e.g., showing when no one is online)](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Team to work on personalizing chat based on page content and user intent](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Jakub recommends being cautious with immediate popups, especially for SEO considerations](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Content categorization:](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [Need to align blog categories with Flosum's internal product/solution interests](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [GrowthX to add a "solution interests" column to their content tracking for better alignment](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Inline content improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [Suggestion to surface more gated assets (white papers, ebooks) within blog content](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
      - [Add more prominent CTAs and buttons for downloads or demos](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
      - [Incorporate social proof elements (e.g., G2 reviews, case studies) within blog content](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Bottom of page enhancements:](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
      - [Reduce duplication of elements (share buttons, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [Add more prominent CTAs related to the blog's topic or product alignment](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Jakub reported issues accessing comprehensive conversion data in Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [Beau to investigate potential tagging issues on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [Team to explore using Marketo for better tracking and personalization capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/hmqdeUULJSxFNMReenYxQdpFJxZdkzCo?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Sydnie to develop specific language for discussing security aspects of Flosum's tools
2.  Beau to send list of solution interests to GrowthX for content categorization
3.  GrowthX to review and potentially update topic clusters in Airtable to align with Flosum's product categories
4.  Jakub to share presentation deck for team to discuss with Webflow developer
5.  Beau to investigate Google Analytics and Marketo tracking on blog pages
6.  Team to prioritize website improvements and determine implementation process
7.  Explore Marketo integration with Webflow for content personalization (pending Webflow tier upgrade)
8.  Matt and Beau to compile a list of website improvements for future implementation
